Lake fishing

Lake fishing
Main Skill: Fishing
Max Efficiency: 160%

You carefully attach your bait with frosty fingers and cast it out upon the calm surface of the lake.

The Lake fishing activity is a Fishing activity.

Locations

This activity can be done at the following locations:

  • Azurazera in Jarvonia
  • Frusenholm in Jarvonia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Fishing lvl. 5.

Keyword Requirements:

  • Have Fishing rod equipped.

Steps 		Base

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.
